home.description: We strengthen Goiás's technology ecosystem through events, networking, and collaboration among developers.

presentations.title: Presentations
presentations.card_desc_1: The first official presentation: The engine of innovation in society. Discover how Reactivando breaks the bubble and brings technology to everyone.

login.welcome_subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue innovating.
login.unified_access_desc: Use your Hub Community login to access the Reactivando platform.
login.kinetic_desc: Join the network that is redefining the innovation ecosystem through collaboration and cutting-edge technology.

about.title: Who we are
about.subtitle: Organizers and leadership of the Reactivando community.
about.story_p1: The community was born in 2018 and held its first in-person meetups in 2019 — including more than 100 sign-ups for a single event, a strong number for the time. When the pandemic hit in 2020, we moved online.
about.story_p2: In 2023 we brought back in-person events and, in 2024, we averaged about 80 to 100 participants per meetup. We coordinate programs like Join Community, lead stages at Campus Party Goiás, and run active Discord and WhatsApp groups for knowledge sharing and opportunities.
about.founder1_bio: Developer with eight years of experience, React Native specialist, instructor at FIAP, and leader of the state's largest tech community. He mentors developers across Brazil and has worked at multiple Y Combinator-backed startups. He is currently Lead Mobile Engineer at Intuit (USA) and is widely known online, especially on LinkedIn, with an average of over 1 million weekly interactions on career and technology content.
about.founder2_bio: Software engineer with 10 years of experience, information security enthusiast, entrepreneur, and part of Reactivando's leadership. Former partner in two Goiânia startups and owner of F&L Software Solutions. He joined Startup Weekend Health (2019), placed 3rd at NASA Space Apps Challenge 2019, and mentored in 2023 and 2024. He has taken part in regional hackathons, including initiatives by the city of Goiânia and Campus Party Goiás.
about.founder3_bio: Software engineer with 10+ years of experience, founder of startup Pix Aí and mobile developer at IPA (Texas, USA). He has joined programs and hackathons such as Hack a Truck (2016), Startup Weekend Goiânia (2016), Rio Quente Tourism Hackathon (winner, 2017), Startup Weekend Urban Mobility Goiânia (winner, 2017), and Startup Weekend Agro (winner, 2017/18 – Concorde). He has mentored at Desafio das Indústrias (2018), NASA Space Apps (2020 and 2024), and Hub Goiás (2024).

landing.hero_desc: Our goal is to strengthen the technology ecosystem in Goiás through events, networking, knowledge sharing, and incentives for collaboration among developers.
landing.stats_title: A community growing with the ecosystem
landing.partners_desc: Hub Goiás, Sebrae, AUVP, and sponsorships at events like Campus Party and Join Community — always connecting people who make things happen.
landing.evolution_title: From the first meetup to gatherings of hundreds.
landing.evolution_desc1: We started by bringing together people who wanted to take technology beyond code: local meetups, honest exchange of experience, and a drive to open the ecosystem to more people.
landing.evolution_desc2: Today Reactivando runs online and in-person events, connects developers to opportunities, and shares technology and career content with thousands of people — rooted in Goiás and looking toward new cities.
landing.timeline_2019_desc: First in-person meetups; 100+ sign-ups for a single event.
landing.timeline_2020_desc: During the pandemic, meetups move online.
landing.timeline_2023_desc: In-person events return; about 80–100 participants per meetup on average.
landing.expansion_desc: We aim to grow into more Brazilian cities, starting with Brasília and Anápolis.
landing.pillar_desc: Events, community, and partnerships for everyone building technology in Goiás and Brazil.
landing.pillar1_desc: Local meetups, hackathons, stages at major festivals (such as Campus Party Goiás), and networking in coworking spaces — always focused on real connection.
landing.pillar2_desc: Discord and WhatsApp groups, live sessions and educational content on technology and career, plus Join Community and initiatives that connect newcomers with experienced builders.
landing.pillar3_desc: We work with Hub Goiás, Sebrae, AUVP, and other organizations on sponsorships, logistics, and visibility — and we are always open to new partners for events and outreach.
landing.cta_desc: Enter the official WhatsApp, follow upcoming meetups, or talk to the team about partnerships and sponsorships.
landing.footer_desc: Strengthening Goiás's technology ecosystem through events, networking, and collaboration among developers.

cadastro.desc: Join the largest network of technical innovators and entrepreneurs. Your journey starts here, integrated with the entire Hub Community ecosystem.
cadastro.form_subtitle: Start your integration into the global ecosystem.
cadastro.hub_warning: Your registration will be processed and managed by the Hub Community. Use the same credentials to access our entire ecosystem at hubcommunity.io.
